prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别为约11162→11843→11658→10041→10332名，整体呈先降后升的波动走势；2024年大幅前移至10041名后，2025年小幅后移至 10332名，近两年基准位次稳定在10000–10400区间；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2022年均为30人，2023–2024年缩减至27人，2025年进一步降至26人；20 26年计划仍为26人，与2025年持平，扩/缩招信号中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第38名（2026年）， 学校层次高、品牌效应强；秦皇岛分校共享东北大学办学资源与学位证书，对考生吸引力稳定；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校区命名争议（直接使 用"校区"二字以消除隔离感），无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第82位（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；近年无投档断档或录取异常记录，报考心理预期平稳；依托东北大学学科体系，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，工科实力突出；招生专业中计算机类、自动化类、 电子信息类等均对应上述A类学科，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2026年社会热度持续偏热至高热推荐，与该 校优势工科专业高度匹配，可能推高相关专业组竞争；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（增幅29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，整体竞争压 力显著上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在10300名附近、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、北京市考生总数大幅增加约30%导 致竞争加剧、学校层次与优势学科维持稳定吸引力等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准10332名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约10402名，区间9902–10902名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（河北）
- 电子信息工程（河北）
- 通信工程（河北）
- 自动化类（河北）（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数学类（河北）（含数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 物联网工程（河北）
- 仪器类（河北）（智能光电感知）
- 机械类（河北）（含机械工程、车辆工程）
- 智能感知工程（河北）
- 机械电子工程（河北）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（河北）（含材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程等）
- 信息管理与信息系统（河北）
- 经济学类（河北）（含经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 工商管理类（河北）（含工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理）
- 外国语言文学类（河北）（含英语、日语）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约10402名，区间9902–10902名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档工科专业为主、一档热门工科专业冲刺、三档经管外语类专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（9902名以内 ）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、电子信息工程等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（10902名附近）建议以三档专业为主、二档专业为辅，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were approximately 11162 → 11843 → 11658 → 10041 → 10332, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing; after a significant forward shift to 10041 in 2024, it slightly moved back to 10332 in 2025, with the baseline ranking stabilizing in the 10000–10400 range in recent two years; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Beijing was 30 students in both 2021 and 2022, reduced to 27 in 2023 and 2024, and further decreased to 26 in 2025; the plan for 2026 remains 26, unchanged from 2025, indicating a neutral expansion/reduction signal.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 38th in the main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities (2026), with a high university level and strong brand effect; the Qinhuangdao campus shares the educational resources and degree certificates of Northeastern University, maintaining stable attraction for candidates; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the campus (directly using the word 'campus' to eliminate the sense of isolation), with no major negative public opinion; the overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 82nd (average), with low short video exposure; there have been no records of application gaps or admission anomalies in recent years, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable; relying on the discipline system of Northeastern University, with Control Science and Engineering rated A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, and Software Engineering A-, the engineering strength is outstanding; among the enrollment majors, Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information, etc., all correspond to the above A-class disciplines, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be hot to highly recommended in 2026, highly matching the university's advantageous engineering majors, potentially increasing competition in related major groups; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (29.7%) compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant growth in candidate scale and a notable rise in overall competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical rankings have stabilized around 10,300 in recent two years, the 2026 enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025, the total number of candidates in Beijing has increased significantly by about 30% leading to intensified competition, and the university's level and advantageous disciplines maintain stable attractiveness, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back from the 2025 baseline of 10,332; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10,402, with a range of 9,902–10,902.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Hebei)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Hebei)
- Communication Engineering (Hebei)
- Automation (Hebei) (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics (Hebei) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Internet of Things Engineering (Hebei)
- Instrumentation (Hebei) (Intelligent Optoelectronic Sensing)
- Mechanical (Hebei) (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Intelligent Perception Engineering (Hebei)
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering (Hebei).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Hebei) (including Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Information Management and Information Systems (Hebei)
- Economics (Hebei) (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (Hebei) (including Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Foreign Languages and Literatures (Hebei) (including English, Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 10,402, range 9,902–10,902. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering majors, aim for Tier 1 popular engineering majors, and use Tier 3 economics, management, and foreign language majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 9,902), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electronic Information Engineering; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 10,902), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2 majors to ensure admission.
